engine.title: Engine
engine.description: TTS engine to use. Leave empty to auto-detect (prefers piper, falls back to espeak)

voice.title: Voice
voice.description: Piper model name or espeak voice code. Leave empty for the default voice

config.edited: System TTS settings have been updated
config.notEdited: Failed to update system TTS settings

texts.aboutSettings: Configure the local text-to-speech engine. No API key is required. Uses piper (neural TTS) or espeak (basic TTS) installed on the system.
